trust_signals.evidence: Packaging quality is explicitly a core trust signal for the brand.
Brand tone is 'fair prices, no nonsense'. Anti-scalper positioning.
Part of the brand experience. Builds recognition.
Explicit brand red line. Community values fairness.

feedback_patterns.pattern: Community responds well to guaranteed-hit style products
feedback_patterns.context: Mega Dream JP performs well because of guaranteed-hit appeal.

feedback_patterns.pattern: Viewers prefer simple, clear bundle structures
feedback_patterns.context: Too many bundle types slow streams down and create confusion.

community_insights.insight: The community is fairness-oriented and anti-scalper
Korean products have gained appreciation over time
